channel.title: Freedom of Thought
channel.description: Recent content on Freedom of Thought

item.title: About
item.description: YIGENG JIANG Currently, I`m a senior student in ZSTU. I work on machine learning, deep learning and computational neuroscience. I’m especially interested in understanding the generalization and memorization in machine and human learning, as well as implications in related areas like privacy. CONTACT Email: jianger421@163.com

item.title: 欢迎来到 Hugo 世界
item.description: 欢迎来到 Hugo 世界。 开始自己的博客之旅。
